---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability that isn't a template
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

> If you want to propose a new visual template, use the **New template** issue type instead.

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who hits it? Be concrete — a real scenario beats an abstract description. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What do you think should happen? Rough is fine. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't pick them. -->

## Scope

- [ ] User-facing feature
- [ ] Data integration (new platform)
- [ ] Developer experience
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Other:

## Mocks / references

<!-- Sketches, links to similar features elsewhere, screenshots — anything that makes the idea concrete. -->

## Willing to implement?

- [ ] I'd like to take this on
- [ ] I can help review but not implement
- [ ] Just suggesting
